title: Canada Gazette Part II - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Gazette Part II
The following regulatory proposals have been made into regulations and are published in Canada Gazette Part II . The publication contains the rationale for the regulatory proposal, the final regulations and the effective date. To facilitate a search, use the SOR (Statutory Orders and Regulations) number provided.
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1475 - Good Manufacturing Practices (Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients) (SOR/2013-74)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1319 - EUND Amendments ( SOR /2011-88)
- Medical Devices Regulations - Project 1402 - Amendment (Developing Countries) ( SOR /2005-142)
- Food and Drug Regulations, Project 1652, Schedule F ( SOR /2012-27)
- Food and Drug Regulations, Project 1651, Schedule F ( SOR /2011-274)
- Food and Drug Regulations, Project 1656, Schedule F ( SOR /2011-275)
- Food and Drug Regulations, Project 1577, Schedule F ( SOR /2011-273)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 743 - Non-medicinal Ingredients Labelling (NMI) ( SOR /2010-105)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1624 - Schedule F Amendment ( SOR /2011-93)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1627 - Schedule F Amendment ( SOR /2011-58)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1594 - Schedule F Amendment ( SOR /2009-305)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1591 - Schedule F Additions ( SOR /2009-279)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1578 - Schedule F Additions ( SOR /2009-117)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1583 - Schedule F Additions ( SOR /2009-118)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1540 - Schedule F Additions ( SOR /2009-116)
- Food and Drug Regulations - Project 1584 - Schedule F Amendment ( SOR /2009-119)
